rulings.Case Title: PACIFICO PACULBA et al VS. CLEAR CHANNEL ENTERTAINMENT TELEVISION HOLDINGS, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Summary Judgment Motion Following Remittitur
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 24, 2007, LINE 3. HEARING ON SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION FOLLOWING REMITTITUR. COURT ORDERS: MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO DR. LEVINE'S DECLARATION OF FEBRUARY 3, 2006 IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO MEDICAL EXAMINER'S FILE IS SUSTAINED AS TO PAGES 4, 5, 6, 7, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29 AND 37. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO D. P. H. FILE (PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT E) IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT'S MATERIAL FACTS: 4 IS DISPUTED. PLAINTIFF'S MATERIAL FACTS: 3 AND 4 ARE DISPUTED. =(302/PJM/AP)
